headline: Nasdaq Reports February 2026 Volumes
summary: NEW YORK, March 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Nasdaq (Nasdaq: NDAQ) today reported monthly volumes for February 2026 on its Investor Relations website. A data sheet showing this information can be found at: https://ir.nasdaq.com/financials/volume-statistics. headline: Nasdaq Texas Launches with Inaugural Dual Listings

headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks to Consider Right Now and 1 We Turn Down
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.
